$comment: rules/core/schemas/llm-finding.json and rules/mongodb/schemas/llm-finding.json are kept byte-for-byte identical (go:embed can't follow symlinks). Edit both; TestLLMFindingSchemasInSync fails closed on drift.
title: skill-gate llm-judge finding
description: The structured verdict an llm_judge rule's response must satisfy. It carries no severity: severity is a property of the rule, applied by the scanner.

fired.description: True only when the content violates the rule.

confidence.description: Confidence in the decision, between 0 and 1.

rationale.description: One or two sentences explaining the decision.

spans.description: Offending locations; empty when fired is false.
